mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in the unemployment rate above 5.5% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, which depress corporate earnings expectations and generate negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous increase in industrial production and decline in inflation signals strong real economic activity with stable pricing, creating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through improved corporate margins.
failure_condition: The correlation between INDPRO and CPIAUCSL reverses, or 20-day returns show no significant positive deviation from baseline.

mechanism_narrative: During monetary tightening cycles, rising federal funds rates reduce liquidity in financial markets, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances when FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in nonfarm payrolls indicates robust labor market conditions that boost consumer spending and drive positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no significant positive deviation from baseline despite PAYEMS growth.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in housing starts above 1,000 thousand units signals strong demand for residential construction, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through sectoral momentum.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 60% of instances when HOUST exceeds 1,000 thousand units.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in inflation and decline in interest rates creates stagflationary pressures that reduce equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The co-movement between CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS breaks down, or 20-day returns show no significant negative deviation from baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production indicates expanding real economic activity, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through improved corporate earnings visibility.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no significant positive deviation from baseline despite INDPRO growth.
